verdict.rationale: The Q4 2025 Finance Pack explicitly computes gross margin from actuals as (4.2800 - 1.5836) / 4.2800 = 63.0%, matching the claim exactly.

evidence.span_text: Gross margin is calculated as (Revenue - Cost of revenue) / Revenue. Using Q4 actuals: (EUR 4.2800m - EUR 1.5836m) / EUR 4.2800m = 63.0%.
